g.text: 1. Users should be able to log expenses

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Users should be able to create groups

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Users should be able to invite users to the group

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Users should be able to specify how to split a given

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: expense within a group or between individuals

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. Users should see the minimum number of transactions that

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: they need to make to settle their debt

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6. Users should be able to settle their debt (not direct

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: payment but marking a debt resolved)
